name: Electric Bread- Sticky Buns
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons Fast Rise Yeast OR 2 teaspoons Active Dry Yeat
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove dough from the machine after the dough or manual cycle is completed.
2. Prepare sticky sauce by warming all the sauce ingredients, except the pecans, over medium heat until sugar dissolves. Pour into 13 x 9 pan. Sprinkle with broken nuts.
3. Turn dough out onto a floured surface (it will be sticky), and punch down. Roll dough to a 16 x 10 rectangle.
4. Dot with soft butter and sprinkle with cinnamon.
5. Roll jellyroll style and pinch seams together.
6. Slice into 1 1/2-inch thick pieces, place into pan on top of sticky sauce, and let double in size (about one hour).
7. Bake at 375°F for 20-25 minutes. Cool for no more than three minutes, then invert pan so sauce and nuts are on top of buns.
